summary: The diff implements all four requirements: REQ-1 (Occitanie → Île-de-France across About, Hero, Services, Testimonials, Contact, Footer), REQ-2 (email restored in Contact and Footer with mailto links), REQ-3 (phone restored in Hero, Contact, Footer with tel: links), and REQ-4 (Île-de-France address added to Contact and Footer). One gap exists: Navigation.tsx phone number restoration is mentioned in REQ-3 AC but the diff summary for Navigation.tsx does not confirm a phone number was added there.

missing_requirements.requirement: A visible phone number is rendered in the Navigation bar (Navigation.tsx) as a tel: link
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary for Navigation.tsx only states 'Sticky responsive navigation bar with defensive scroll helpers, useCallback on all handlers, mobile menu toggle, and safe event listener cleanup.' It does not mention a phone number being added. No content from Navigation.tsx is shown in the diff that confirms a phone number is rendered there.
